Name: Pitcher/Batter attribute import
Description: Includes CON -1 adjustment when Hit and Run is toggled on

Name: Strikeythrowy, when a Hit and Run is toggled on and the batter strikes out, so there is then a steal attempt
Outs
Description: # of outs in the half inning

Name: Bunting
Description: Whether the batter is bunting

Name: Hit and Run
Description: Whether there is a hit and run

Name: Batter/Pitcher Handedness Modifier
Description: If pitcher and batter handedness is the same, 1-modifier, if different, 1+modifier

Name: Batter attributes relative to Pitcher attributes
Description: Calculates difference between each related stat

Name: Batter/Pitcher attribute difference width impact lookup
Description: Lookup for incremental result range changes due to attribute differences
Question: What is Dynamic GOFOPOs? Is this triggered in Script?

Name: Attribute-agnostic high-level batter ranges
Description: Calculates batter ranges for same handedness/without regard to handedness/opposite handedness, takes into account Additional range modifiers table

Name: 1B Range
Description: 1B is what is leftover from the hit range minus extra base hits

Name: Flyout Range
Description: Flyout range calculated as Total Out Range (500 - top of BB/walk range) * Flyout % - Popout Range

Name: Popout Range
Description: Popout range calculated as Total Out Range (500 - top of BB/walk range) * Popout % * Flyout % +2 (not sure why +2)
Question: Why is 2 added to this range?

Name: Groundout range
Description: Total Out Range - K width

Name: Attribute-agnostic high-level batter ranges, same handedness
Description: Adjusts base high-level batter ranges for handedness modifier
Constants: Subtracts 1 width from 1B result; adds 2 width to PO result

Name: Attribute-agnostic high-level batter ranges, opposite handedness
Description: Adjusts base high-level batter ranges for handedness modifier
Constants: Subtracts 1 width from 1B result; adds 2 width to PO result

Name: Batter/Pitcher attribute difference width lookup
Description: Lookup for total result range changes due to attribute differences
Constants: No value lower than 1 is ensured

Name: Flyout %
Description: Rate is 2 times the width of FO (from the attribute difference lookup)

Name: Popout %
Description: Rate is 2 times the width of PO (from the attribute difference lookup)

Name: Base widths with regard to pitcher/batter attributes, handedness, and global range modifiers table
Description: Result in column U, Attribute differences for batter's perspective shown in column V, looks up value from the A26:N34 table and adds the Global range modifiers, multiplies by 1+ handedness modifier. 1B calc is different because it takes the Hit width from A26:N34 and applies the handedness modifier then adds on the range modifier from D43:N43 corresponding to batter CON - pitcher MOV and then adds on range modifier from D40:N40 corresponding to batter SPD - pitcher AWR and then adds on range modifier from D41:N41 corresponding to pitcher AWR - 3 and then adds on I42 which is currently a constant of 5 but we'd want to abstract all of these constants out into our code, and then subtracts off the widths of HR 3B 2B and then adds 20 if the Infield In toggle is on; general note: all results except for lineout (LO) are at least 1; and when the handedness multiplier is applied that intermediate result is rounded down

Name: Flyout Width
Description: Similar logic to R17 just now with respect to pitcher/batter attributes built in

Name: Popout Width
Description: Similar logic to R18 just now with respect to pitcher/batter attributes built in

Name: Groundout Width
Description: Equal to 500 - all other widths and then add 1 on end
Question: Why is 1 added to this range?

Name: Lineout Width
Description: If there are no baserunners in Z11:Z13, this width is 0. If there are 2 outs, this width is 0. Otherwise this width is 4.

Name: Steal Safe Zones
Description: Baserunner speed, relativity to avg of pitcher AWR and catcher EYE, and safe zone lookup for the steal given the difference of that baserunner's SPD - the pitcher/catcher avg and the steal lookup table depending on which base they would be stealing

Name: Steal Safe Zone Table
Description: Given the difference in baserunner SPD compared to the avg of pitcher AWR and catcher EYE, and which base that runner would be stealing, this calculates the safe range

Name: Base DP Rate (Double Play)
Description: For OBC 1 (runner on 1st)

Name: Neutral GORA Rate (Groundout runners advance)
Description: For OBC 1 (runner on 1st)

Name: Neutral GORA Rate (Groundout runners advance)
Description: For OBC 2 or 3

Name: Neutral GORA Rate (Groundout runners advance)
Description: For OBC 6

Name: Neutral GORA Rate (Groundout runners advance)
Description: For OBC 7

Name: Speed multiplier
Description: For OBC 1 (runner on 1st); Increase/decrease the GORA rate by this amount for each SPD rating above/below 3.

Name: Speed multiplier
Description: For OBC 2 or 3; Increase/decrease the GORA rate by this amount for each SPD rating above/below 3.

Name: Speed multiplier
Description: For OBC 4; Increase/decrease the GORA rate by this amount for each SPD rating above/below 3.

Name: Speed multiplier
Description: For OBC 6; Increase/decrease the GORA rate by this amount for each SPD rating above/below 3.

Name: Speed multiplier
Description: For OBC 7; Increase/decrease the GORA rate by this amount for each SPD rating above/below 3.

Name: Double Play Range Multiplier
Description: For OBC 4; Multiply the base DP rate by this number to account for having more defensive options to turn two.

Name: Base FCH Rate (Fielder's Choice at Home Plate)
Description: For OBC 7

Name: Dynamic Groundout Rates by OBC and baserunner(s) speed; here is where baserunner speed needs to be increased by 1 when Hit and Run is toggled on
Description: See rows below for more specifics

Name: Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 1
Description: Respective Neutral GORA Rate given OBC 1+ Respective Speed Multiplier * (baserunner on 1st speed - 3)

Name: Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 2
Description: Respective Neutral GORA Rate given OBC 2 or 3 + Respective Speed Multiplier * (baserunner on 2nd speed - 3)

Name: Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 3
Description: Neutral GORA Rate for OBC 2 or 3+ Respective Speed Multiplier * (baserunner on 3rd speed - 3)

Name: Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 4
Description: Respective Neutral GORA Rate given OBC 1 + Speed Multiplier for OBC 1 * (avg(baserunner on 1st speed, baserunner on 2nd speed) - 3)

Name: Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 5
Description: Respective Neutral GORA Rate given OBC 1 + Speed Multiplier for OBC 1 * (avg(baserunner on 1st speed, baserunner on 2nd speed, baserunner on 3rd speed) - 3)

Name: Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 6
Description: Respective Neutral GORA Rate given OBC 6 + Speed Multiplier for OBC 6 * (avg(baserunner on 1st speed, baserunner on 2nd speed, baserunner on 3rd speed) - 3)

Name: Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 7
Description: 0 if current OBC is not 7; otherwise equals Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 5

Name: Dynamic GO Rate for OBC 0
Description: Equals 1

Name: Dynamic GO Rate for OBC 2
Description: Equals 1 - Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 2

Name: Dynamic GO Rate for OBC 3
Description: Equals 1 - Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 3

Name: Dynamic GO Rate for OBC 6
Description: Equals 1 - Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 6

Name: Dynamic FC Rate for OBC 1
Description: Equals 1 - Dynamic DP Rate for OBC 1 - Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 1

Name: Dynamic FC Rate for OBC 4
Description: Equals half of (1- Dynamic DP21 Rate for OBC 4 - Dynamic DP31 Rate for OBC 4 - Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 4)

Name: Dynamic FC Rate for OBC 5
Description: Equals 1 - Dynamic DP Rate for OBC 5 - Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 5 - Dynamic DPRun Rate for OBC 5

Name: Dynamic FC3rd Rate for OBC 4 (Fielder's Choice at 3rd base)
Description: Equals Dynamic FC Rate for OBC 4

Name: Dynamic FCH for OBC 7 (Fielder's Choice at Home Plate)
Description: 0 if current OBC is not 7; otherwise equals Base FCH Rate + Speed Mutliplier for OBC 7  * (avg(baserunner on 1st speed, baserunner on 2nd speed, baserunner on 3rd speed) - 3)

Name: Dynamic DP rate for OBC 1
Description: Base DP Rate for OBC 1 - 10% * (batter speed - 3)

Name: Dynamic DP rate for OBC 5
Description: (Base DP Rate for OBC 1 - 10% * (batter speed - 3))/2 * (1 + DP Range Multiplier for OBC 4)

Name: Dynamic DPRun Rate for OBC 5
Description: If there are 1+ outs, this is 0 (can't score on a double play), otherwise (1 - (Neutral GORA Rate for OBC 1 + Speed Multiplier for OBC 1 * (avg(baserunner on 1st speed, baserunner on 2nd speed, baserunner on 3rd speed) - 3)) - Dynamic DP Rate for OBC 5 - Dynamic DP Rate for OBC 5) all this divided by 2

Name: Dynamic DP21 Rate for OBC 4
Description: Equals Dynamic DP31 Rate for OBC 4

Name: Dynamic DP21 Rate for OBC 7
Description: 0 if current OBC is not 7; otherwise 1 - Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 7 - Dynamic DP31 Rate for OBC 7 - Dynamic DPH1 Rate for OBC 7 - Dynamic FCH Rate for OBC 7

Name: Dynamic DP31 Rate for OBC 4
Description: (Base DP Rate for OBC 1 - 10% * (batter speed - 3))/2 * (1 + DP Range Multiplier for OBC 4)

Name: Dynamic DP31 Rate for OBC 7
Description: 0 if current OBC is not 7; otherwise ROUNDDOWN to 3 decimals: (1 - Dynamic FCH Rate for OBC 7 - Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 7) / (If Infield In, 4, else 3)

Name: Dynamic DPH1 Rate for OBC 7
Description: 0 if current OBC is not 7; otherwise ROUNDDOWN to 3 decimals: (1 - Dynamic FCH Rate for OBC 7 - Dynamic GORA Rate for OBC 7) / (If Infield In, 2, else 3)

Name: Well Hit Speed Multiplier
Description: WH Range increases by this for each baserunner's raw SPD above 3, or decreases by 1/2 of this for each SPD below 3.

Name: Well Hit Hit and Run Multiplier
Speed of lead runner
Description: If runner on 2nd base, 2nd base runner, else 1st base runner

Name: Speed of trail runner
Description: If no runner on 1st base, empty, else cap runner on 1st's speed to the speed of the runner on 2nd base

Name: Lead Runner multiplier
Description: If 2 outs, equal to Well Hit 2 Out Multiplier, else if Hit and Run toggled on, equal to Well Hit Hit and Run Multiplier, else 1

Name: Trail Runner multiplier
Description: If there is a trail runner, equals same multiplier as G75

Name: Lead Runner Well Hit %
Comments: Increases well hit % for fast lead runner

Name: Trail Runner Well Hit %
Comments: Increases well hit % for fast trail runner

Name: Base Hit Range
Description: Sum of all Final hit results (HR, 3B, 2B, 1B, IF1B) - 1

Name: Bunt Hit Range
Comments: Increases bunt hit range by Bunt Multiplier * SPD:MOV advantage %, subtracts off B1BWH range

Name: Bunt Use
Description: Determines whether you're bunting for a hit, or suicide squeezing a runner home, sacrificing a runner to 3rd, sacrificing a runner to 2nd; depends which runners are on base

Name: Sacrifice Bunt Rate Table
Description: Determined by Batter SPD - Pitcher AWR

Name: Groundout Rate Calculator
Description: I don't think this is used anymore

Name: Flyout Rate Calculator
Description: I don't think this is used anymore

Name: Subrange Calculator
Description: This is where the base widths from U11:W21 are pulled in and then these ranges are split up into subranges given some of the more intricate calculations already done above

Name: 2BWH rate
Description: Not sure why the reliance on Y23 since that doesn't have a formula. If there's no runner on 1st, this is 0 rate, otherwise it's based on WH% of Trail Runner from H76 unless that's blank then it's based on WH% of Lead Runner from H75

Name: 2B Rate
Description: 1 - T30 (rest of 2B rate goes here)

Name: 1BWH rate
Description: If no runners on 1st/2nd, 0, otherwise it's based on WH% of Trail Runner from H76 unless that's blank then it's based on WH% of Lead Runner from H75

Name: 1BWH2 rate
Description: Only has value with runners on 1st AND 2nd; otherwise se to H75 - H76

Name: 1B rate
Description: 1 - T33 - T34 (rest of 1B rate goes here)

Name: IF1B rate
Description: Set to 0 if Infield In is toggled on, else set to 1

Name: DSacF rate
Description: If 2 outs, set to 0 (can't have sac fly with 2 outs), if no runner on 3rd base to start, set to 0, else if no runner on 2nd base to start, set to 0, else set to DFO% from I75

Name: DFO rate
Description: If 2 outs, set to 0 (can't have sac fly with 2 outs), if no runner on 3rd base to start, set to 0, else if no runner on 2nd base to start, set to 0, else set to DFO% from I75

Name: SacF rate
Description: If no runners on 2nd and 3rd, set to 0, if 2 outs, set to 0, if no runner on 3rd base to start, set to 0, else set to 1 - DSacF from T41

Name: FO rate
Description: If 2 outs, set to 1, else if T43 > 0, set to 0, else if there are no baserunners, set to 1, else set to 1 - T42 - T41

Name: GORA rate
Description: If Infield In is toggled on, set to 0; if 2 outs, set to 0, otherwise look up GORA rate from Dynamic Groundout GORA Rate given the OBC before the swing

Name: FCH rate
Description: If 2 outs, set to 0, otherwise look up FCH rate from Dynamic Groundout FCH Rate given the OBC before the swing

Name: FC rate
Description: If 2 outs, set to 0, otherwise look up FC rate from Dynamic Groundout FC Rate given the OBC before the swing

Name: GO rate
Description: Look up GO rate from Dynamic Groundout GO Rate given the OBC before the swing

Name: FC3rd rate
Description: If 2 outs, set to 0, otherwise look up FC3rd rate from Dynamic Groundout FC3rd Rate given the OBC before the swing

Name: DPRun rate
Description: If 2 outs, set to 0, otherwise look up DPRun rate from Dynamic Groundout DPRun Rate given the OBC before the swing

Name: DP rate
Description: If 2 outs, set to 0, otherwise look up DP rate from Dynamic Groundout DP Rate given the OBC before the swing

Name: DP21 rate
Description: If 2 outs, set to 0, otherwise look up DP21 rate from Dynamic Groundout DP21 Rate given the OBC before the swing

Name: DP31 rate
Description: If 2 outs, set to 0, otherwise look up DP31 rate from Dynamic Groundout DP31 Rate given the OBC before the swing

Name: DPH1 rate
Description: If 2 outs, set to 0, otherwise look up DPH1 rate from Dynamic Groundout DPH1 Rate given the OBC before the swing

Name: TP rate
Description: If 1+ outs, set to 0, if runners on 1st and 2nd, set to 1

Name: LOTP rate
Description: Not included for now, this setting is off

Name: Final HR width
Description: If Rounddown of T26 * U26 = 0, set to 1, else use U26

Name: Final 3B width
Description: Rounddown T28 * U28

Name: Final 2BWH width
Description: Rounddown T30 * U30

Name: Final 2B width
Description: Set to U31 - V30 (full 2B width - 2BWH width)

Name: Final 1BWH width
Description: Rounddown T33 * U33 and then add IF1B width here only if Hit and Run AND Infield In are toggled on

Name: Final 1BWH2 width
Description: Rounddown T34 * U34

Name: Final 1B width
Description: Set to U35 - V33 - V34 (full 1B width - 1BWH and 1BWH2 widths)

Name: Final IF1B width
Description: Rounddown T37*U37, this indirectly is set to 0 if Infield In is toggled on

Name: Final DSacF width
Description: Rounddown T41*U41

Name: Final DFO width
Description: Rounddown T42*U42

Name: Final SacF width
Description: If SacF rate is 0, set to 0, else set to Total FO width - final DSacF width - final DFO width

Name: Final FO width
Description: If SacF final width is > 0, set to 0, else set to Total FO width - final DFO width

Name: Final PO width
Description: Roundown T46*U46

Name: Final GORA width
Description: Roundown T48*U48

Name: Final FCH width
Description: If sum of other dynamic groundout rates (except for GORA, FCH) = 0, set to Total GO width - final GORA width; otherwise Rounddown T49*U49

Name: Final FC width
Description: If sum of other dynamic groundout rates (except for GORA, FCH, FC) = 0, set to Total GO width - final GORA width - final FCH width; otherwise Rounddown T50*U50

Name: Final GO width
Description: If sum of other dynamic groundout rates (except for GORA, FCH, FC, GO) = 0, set to Total GO width - final GORA width - final FCH width - final FC width; otherwise Rounddown T51*U51

Name: Final FC3rd width
Description: If sum of other dynamic groundout rates (except for GORA, FCH, FC, GO, FC3rd) = 0, set to Total GO width - final GORA width - final FCH width - final FC width - final GO width; otherwise Rounddown T52*U52

Name: Final DPRun width
Description: If sum of other dynamic groundout rates (except for GORA, FCH, FC, GO, FC3rd, DPRun) = 0, set to Total GO width - final GORA width - final FCH width - final FC width - final GO width - final FC3rd width; otherwise Rounddown T53*U53

Name: Final DP width
Description: If sum of other dynamic groundout rates (except for GORA, FCH, FC, GO, FC3rd, DPRun, DP) = 0, set to Total GO width - final GORA width - final FCH width - final FC width - final GO width - final FC3rd width - final DPRun width; otherwise Rounddown T54*U54

Name: Final DP21 width
Description: If sum of other dynamic groundout rates (except for GORA, FCH, FC, GO, FC3rd, DPRun, DP, DP21) = 0, set to Total GO width - final GORA width - final FCH width - final FC width - final GO width - final FC3rd width - final DPRun width - final DP width; otherwise Rounddown T55*U55

Name: Final DP31 width
Description: If sum of other dynamic groundout rates (except for GORA, FCH, FC, GO, FC3rd, DPRun, DP, DP21, DP31) = 0, set to Total GO width - final GORA width - final FCH width - final FC width - final GO width - final FC3rd width - final DPRun width - final DP width - final DP21 width; otherwise Rounddown T56*U56

Name: Final DPH1 width
Description: Rounddown T57*U57

Name: Final K width
Description: Rounddown T59*U59 + if sum of (LODP, TP, LOTP rates) = then add W21 (attributed to lineout, but if this essentially can't happen, this gets allocated back to K)

Name: Final LODP width
Description: Set to Total LO width - final TP width - final LOTP width

Name: Final LOTP width
Description: Not included for now, this setting is off

Name: SacB rate
Description: If OBC = 0, 0, else look up batter SPD - pitcher AWR relativity in Sacrifice Bunt table provided the bunt use in B82 which is determined by the baserunners

Name: Bunt Double Play rate
Description: If OBC = 0, 0, else look up batter SPD - pitcher AWR relativity in Sacrifice Bunt table row 89 (Double Play row)

Name: Bunt Groundout Rate
Description: 1 - SacB rate - Bunt DP rate

Name: Bunt Triple Play rate
Description: equals swing TP rate

Name: Bunt Lineout Triple play rate
Description: Not included for now, this setting is off

Name: B1BWH Base width
Description: Equals B1BWH range constant

Name: B1B Base width
Description: Equals Bunt Hit range result in M81

Name: BB Base width
Description: Equals BB width of normal swing

Name: Bunt K Base width
Description: Equals K width of normal swing

Name: SacB Base width
Description: Equals 500 - widths of (B1BWH, B1B, BB, K) - widths of (Bunt TP)

Name: Bunt Double Play Base width
Description: Equals Bunt Groundout Base width

Name: Bunt Groundout Base width
Description: Equals SacB Base width

Name: Bunt Triple Play Base width
Description: Equals swing TP width

Name: B1BWH Final width
Description: Equals T67*U67

Name: B1B Final width
Description: Equals T68*U68

Name: BB Final width
Description: Equals T69*U69

Name: K Final width
Description: Equals T70*U70

Name: SacB Final width
Description: Rounddown T71*U71

Name: Bunt Double Play Final width
Description: Rounddown T72*U72

Name: Bunt Groundout Final width
Description: Equals 500 - final widths (B1BWH, B1B, BB, K, Bunt TP) + 1

Name: Bunt Triple Play Final width
Description: Equals T74*U74

Name: Final Swing Ranges
Description: Pulls from calculator tab, orders swing results by order column, and generates ranges using the final widths

Name: Final Bunt Ranges
Description: Pulls from calculator tab, orders bunt results by order column, and generates ranges using the final widths
